column1: # TurboUSD Node — partition table for ESP32-S3 with 8 MB flash
# Layout: NVS + OTA metadata + two equal app slots + SPIFFS for assets
# Offsets / sizes must stay within 0x800000 (8 MB total):
#   app0     0x10000 → 0x33FFFF  (3.1875 MB)  — OTA slot 0 (active after first flash)
#   app1     0x340000→ 0x66FFFF  (3.1875 MB)  — OTA slot 1 (target during OTA update)
